category_sources: Official Monitoring Plugins homepage says the team maintains standard plugins for Icinga, Naemon, Nagios, Shinken, Sensu, and other monitoring applications.
source_facts.description says Monitoring Plugins provides plugins for Nagios-compatible monitoring systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monitoring-plugins; official site branding is Monitoring Plugins.
docs_sources: Official Monitoring Plugins documentation includes manual pages and development guidelines.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Monitoring Plugins repository browser lists the monitoring-plugins repository and clone URLs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Nagios-compatible monitoring plugins; official homepage describes standalone command-line check plugins for monitoring applications.
